name: Chicken-Pasta Sald with Blueberries
recipeIngredient: 9 Ounces Package Frozen French Cut Green Beans, thawed
3 Cups Fusilli Pasta, cooked without salt or flavoring
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green beans between paper towels and squeeze until barely moist.
2. Combine the green beans and next six ingredients in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the yogurt and next four ingredients; stir well.
4. Pour the yogurt mixture over the chicken mixture and toss gently.
5. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
6. Serve on a lettuce-lined serving plate.
Yield: 6 servings
